name: autoloop
description: Backlog-driven continuous repository execution for Codex with verification loops and explicit skill and CLI entrypoints.

interface.shortDescription: Continuous repo execution with backlog and Ralph Loop guards
interface.longDescription: Autoloop packages backlog-driven continuous development for Codex as a pure official plugin bundle. Because current Codex runtime does not load Hook manifests from plugins, this plugin intentionally drops `~autoloop` Hook mode and uses explicit skill and CLI entrypoints instead.
defaultPrompt: Use Autoloop to inspect backlog state and keep this repo moving with explicit run-loop commands.
